title: Talent Avenue Match Market
topic: skill evidence, project needs, mentor routes, and reception paths
skill_description: Match verified talent evidence to project needs, mentors, and reception routes with reviewable rationale.
review_reason: keeper reviews evidence, self-claim boundaries, consent, conflict, and next action
quality_rules: Every match must link to evidence or clearly label it as a claim.
Project-fit rationale must name skill, availability, and next action.
Sensitive reception or VIP notes must remain projection-safe.
skill_rules: Normalize talent signals into skills, evidence, availability, and interests.
Match needs to capabilities with uncertainty instead of ranking people generically.
Return weak evidence to the claim-review queue.

participants.title: Skill Graph Desk
participants.perspective: The talent graph is only useful if it distinguishes verified work from aspiration.
participants.current_question: Which skill edge has enough evidence to use in a match?
participants.contribution: Provides skill edges, proof sources, confidence, and missing verification.

participants.title: Project Needs Desk
participants.perspective: A good match starts with the project bottleneck and collaboration context.
participants.current_question: Which project need is specific enough to match against evidence?
participants.contribution: Provides project requirements, role needs, timing, and collaboration constraints.

participants.title: Mentor Routes Desk
participants.perspective: Mentor and reception routes should be justified by goals, not status.
participants.current_question: Which mentor or reception path has clear mutual purpose?
participants.contribution: Provides route candidates, purpose, context window, and public-safe notes.
